subject: Re: What is the dashboard to-do list?
body: Re: Dashboard to-do list — Jay's main dashboard is EcDash at jay-portfolio-production.up.railway.app. The to-do list could be one of several things: (1) The EcEcho bridge queue — tasks Jay queues there get picked up by Echo. (2) The Notes panel on EcDash where we exchange messages. (3) A specific task/todo feature within one of the apps. Could you clarify which dashboard Jay meant? Is it the EcDash portal, the Alexander AI Support dashboard at agents.alexanderai.site, or something else? I want to make sure items go in the right place.
